included_sources.title: Qwen-AgentWorld: Language World Models for General Agents
included_sources.abstract: Frames language world models as predictors of environment dynamics from state and action. Lucky Loop applies this idea to experiment outcomes.

included_sources.title: The AI Scientist: Towards Fully Automated Open-Ended Scientific Discovery
included_sources.abstract: An autonomous scientific discovery system that generates ideas, writes code, runs experiments, and drafts papers. Useful as a baseline for end-to-end AI scientist workflows.

included_sources.title: Agent Laboratory: Using LLM Agents as Research Assistants
included_sources.abstract: A multi-agent research assistant workflow covering literature review, experiments, and report writing.

included_sources.title: MLE-bench: Evaluating Machine Learning Agents on Machine Learning Engineering
included_sources.abstract: A benchmark for ML engineering agents where agents search over real machine learning experiment spaces and are evaluated by task performance.
